mapper.select: SELECT C.member_chnl_id AS memberChannelId, C.member_chnl_nm AS memberChannelName, C.member_chnl_sn AS channelPriority, C.pin_type AS pinType, C.pin_type_id AS pinTypeId, C.album_id AS albumId, IFNULL(C.track_cnt, 0) AS trackCount, IFNULL(C.chnl_play_tm, 0) AS channelPlayTime, C.update_dtime AS updateDateTime, C.create_dtime AS createDateTime, D.ALBUM_IMG_SIZE AS size, D.album_img_url AS url, D.update_dtime AS albumImgUpdateDateTime, E.TITLE AS albumTitle FROM TB_MEMBER_CHNL AS C LEFT JOIN TB_ALBUM_IMG D ON C.ALBUM_ID = D.ALBUM_ID LEFT JOIN TED_ALBUM E ON C.ALBUM_ID = E.ALBUM_ID WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND member_no = #{memberNo} AND member_chnl_id = #{channelId} ORDER BY channelPriority ASC
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_MEMBER_CHNL A
ALBUM_ID = #{albumId},
MEMBER_CHNL_SN = #{viewPriority},
TRACK_CNT = IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(B.TRACK_ID) FROM TB_MAP_MEMBER_CHNL_TRACK B WHERE A.MEMBER_CHNL_ID = B.MEMBER_CHNL_ID GROUP BY A.MEMBER_CHNL_ID), 0),
CHNL_PLAY_TM = IFNULL((SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN LENGTH(C.TRACK_PLAY_TM) > 5 THEN CAST(SUBSTR(C.TRACK_PLAY_TM, 1, 3) AS UNSIGNED) ELSE CAST(SUBSTR(C.TRACK_PLAY_TM, 1, 2) AS UNSIGNED) END) + TRUNCATE(SUM(CAST(SUBSTR(C.TRACK_PLAY_TM, 4, 2) AS UNSIGNED)) / 60, 0) FROM TB_MAP_MEMBER_CHNL_TRACK D JOIN TB_TRACK C ON D.TRACK_ID = C.TRACK_ID WHERE A.MEMBER_CHNL_ID = D.MEMBER_CHNL_ID GROUP BY A.MEMBER_CHNL_ID), 0),
UPDATE_DTIME = #{updateDateTime}
AND MEMBER_CHNL_ID = #{channelId} AND CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.select: SELECT b.album_id FROM tb_map_member_chnl_track a JOIN tb_track b ON a.track_id = b.track_id AND b.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN b.disp_start_dtime AND b.disp_end_dtime WHERE a.member_chnl_id = #{channelId} ORDER BY a.update_dtime DESC, a.track_sn ASC LIMIT 1;
mapper.update: update tb_member_chnl a left outer join ( select mt.member_chnl_id, tt.album_id from tb_map_member_chnl_track mt join tb_track tt on tt.track_id = mt.track_id AND tt.disp_status_yn ='Y' AND now() BETWEEN tt.disp_start_dtime AND tt.disp_end_dtime where mt.member_chnl_id = #{channelId} order by mt.update_dtime DESC, mt.track_sn ASC limit 1) b on a.member_chnl_id = b.member_chnl_id set a.album_id = ifnull(b.album_id,0) where a.member_chnl_id = #{channelId}
